pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 32 and 44 - both duplicate records have FchPat_Nee='1967-04-12'
setup_task.sh lines 27 and 39 - both records have FchGnrl_NomDos='DUPONT'
setup_task.sh line 16 - GUID_A shell variable, used for Record A in IndexNomPrenom and fchpat tables
setup_task.sh line 17 - GUID_B shell variable, used for Record B in IndexNomPrenom and fchpat tables
setup_task.sh line 45 - Record B FchPat_Adresse field, which has complete address while Record A has empty address
setup_task.sh line 45 - Record B FchPat_Ville field, which has city while Record A has empty city
setup_task.sh line 33 - Record A FchPat_Tel1 field, which has phone while Record B has empty phone
setup_task.sh line 39 - Record B FchGnrl_Prenom field in IndexNomPrenom table (with hyphen), while Record A has 'Marie Claire' without hyphen at line 27
export_result.sh line 13 - REPORT_PATH shell variable storing the path where task output report must be written

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic patient data created by the setup script. Two duplicate records for the same patient (DUPONT, born 1967-04-12) are created: Record A (GUID: DUP-MERGE-AAA-001) contains phone number 0145678901 and SSN 2670475002123 but has empty address fields; Record B (GUID: DUP-MERGE-BBB-002) contains complete address (15 Rue de la Paix, Paris, 75002) and SSN 2670475002123 but has empty phone. Record A uses firstname 'Marie Claire' (no hyphen) while Record B uses 'Marie-Claire' (with hyphen). The task requires merging these into a single consolidated record with all information (including the hyphenated firstname) and deleting the duplicate, then creating an audit report at /home/ga/merge_report.txt documenting which GUID was kept and which was deleted.
